ideation: This animation sequence represents the number 6️⃣ using arm poses.  The robot will form the shape of a '6' with its arms.  Because the robot has no elbows, the '6' will be formed by a combination of arm rotations and angles.  The sequence will emphasize the curve and the straight line of the number 6, and the final frame will hold the pose for a brief period before returning to the rest position. The left arm will form the curved part of the 6 and the right arm will form the straight part.

frames.beat: left arm sweeps down, right arm points straight up
left arm begins to curve inward, forming the loop
the curve of the 6 completes, right arm holds steady
the number 6 is formed, held for a moment
